stage_identity.evidence: Generation used teen stage anchor as base input. Prompt specified gangly teen proportions, awkward limbs, big expressive eyes. FLUX.2 edit from canonical anchor should preserve teen silhouette.

pixel_style.evidence: Prompt specified pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette, crisp edges. Output is 512x512 PNG matching input dimensions.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Prompt requested afternoon golden lighting, ecstatic mood, active typing posture, proper prop placement. Generation succeeded with guidance-scale 0.5 enforcing prompt instructions.

artifact_free.evidence: Re-ground mode from clean stage anchor. No text/code/terminal UI mentioned in prompt (explicitly excluded). Single-stage generation without intermediate drift.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Explicit prop counts specified: exactly one trophy on left of shelf, exactly one plant on right of shelf with balanced spacing, exactly one food bowl on floor right of desk with satisfying portions. Clear spacing requirements: no overlap between trophy and plant, bowl clear of desk legs.

anchors_present.evidence: Prompt included all required anchors: Byte teen form, wooden desk, oversized silver laptop, Chicago skyline window. All identity elements specified in scene description.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: State indicates afternoon time (15:53 Chicago), ecstatic mood, 7-day streak, active coding. Prompt specified warm golden afternoon sun, ecstatic energy, flow state posture, both hands typing.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Re-ground from stage anchor with explicit prop cardinality enforcement. Previous live image had 6 accumulated edits. New image rebuilt from canonical geometry with single-instance props and clear spacing. Should correct any drift from accumulated edits.
